description: Retrieves a list of People who have Tags that are either expired or within their expiration warning period. This report is executed under the context of the specified Group ID. If you want to fetch data for all groups in a company, use `all` in place of `{group_id}`.

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

parameters.name: tagIds
parameters.description: Array of UUIDs representing the Tags you want to filter the report by. If not provided, the report includes all Tags available to the Group.

parameters.name: warningTags
parameters.description: Determines whether Tags within their expiration warning period should be included in the report. If set to `false`, only expired Tags will be included.

parameters.name: employee_number
parameters.description: Filter results by the exact employee number of the Person.

parameters.name: jobTitle
parameters.description: Whether to include the person's Job Title.

schema.description: Returns an array of People with Tags requiring action.

items.description: Object representing a Person with a Tag requiring action.

first.description: The first name of the Person.

last.description: The last name of the Person.

employee_number.description: The employee number of the Person.

job_title.description: The Job Title of the Person.

tag.description: Details about the Tag requiring action.

expr_date.description: Expiration date of the Tag in Unix timestamp format.
